artPrompt: A widescreen film-still of a wild-eyed goblin saboteur sprinting through a chaotic town square at night, clutching a sparking, fuse-lit ballot box to his chest with a manic grin, embers and confetti trailing behind him; overturned boxes and bonfire glow rim his silhouette in flame orange against night-black smoke, torn blank bunting whipping overhead, gleeful anarchic mayhem, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Ballot Box Bomber
text: When Ballot Box Bomber dies, it deals 2 damage to any target.
flavorText: Every vote counts. His counted twice and then exploded.
